"/usr/bin/gcc-ar-14" qc libsplix_core.a CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/algo0x0d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/algo0x0e.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/algo0x11.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/algo0x13.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/algo0x15.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/band.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/bandplane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/colors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/compress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/document.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/page.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/ppdfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/printer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/qpdl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/rendering.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/request.cpp.o CMakeFiles/splix_core.dir/src/sp_semaphore.cpp.o
